scripts.docs:validate: pnpm docs:typecheck && pnpm test:unit:docs && pnpm docs:build && pnpm test:e2e:docs
scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json biome.json tsdown.config.ts .npmrc .gitignore
scripts.openapi:check: pnpm --filter ./modules/contract generate:check && pnpm --filter ./modules/contract build && node --input-type=module --eval "import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const contractModule = await import(pathToFileURL(process.cwd() + '/modules/contract/dist/index.mjs').href); if (contractModule.openApiDocument.openapi !== '3.1.0') throw new Error('expected OpenAPI 3.1.0 document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.healthPath]) throw new Error('expected health path in OpenAPI document');"
scripts.release:check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm smoke
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --types node tsdown.config.ts && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.test:build-fixtures: pnpm --filter ./modules/contract build && pnpm --filter ./modules/api build && pnpm --filter ./modules/cli build
scripts.test:unit:docs: pnpm exec vitest run --passWithNoTests --config vitest.workspace.ts --project docs
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:build-fixtures && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project contract
scripts.test:integration: pnpm test:build-fixtures && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project api --project cli
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm test:build-fixtures && pnpm exec playwright test
scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:unit:docs && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:e2e:docs
scripts.gcm: git fetch origin && git checkout origin/main
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm docs:build && pnpm smoke
